channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12511] Prepare lustre for adoption into the linux kernel
item.description:
This is for book keeping all the work that is being done to submit the Lustre client for acceptance into the Linux kernel. Alongside the tickets below, there are a few major areas that need to be addressed before the client can be submitted.

Lustre Upstreaming Requirements

This is now being tracked on https://wiki.lustre.org/Upstream_contributing
item.summary: Prepare lustre for adoption into the linux kernel

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

Yes their is more. This ticket is for book keeping as well of the issues impacting upstream / lastest kernels.
Hmm. All the patches have landed but this sounds like a very open-ended description so I expect more is to come...
